Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0D00 "THELASTV8-07DB-0D00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07db dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Last V8, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07DB to zero out the tape buffer to prevent a sprite corruption issue. It then jumps to the entry point at $0D00 (it couldn't use RTS because of the zeroing overwriting the boot code).
